name: LegalZoom.com, Inc.

profile.description: LegalZoom is a leading online platform for legal, compliance, and business formation services, helping small businesses with LLC formation, trademark registration, estate planning, and ongoing compliance.

innovation.label: DEVELOPING
innovation.analysis: Track Record (1/3): Revenue growth of 17.7% YoY shows steady but unspectacular execution in online legal services [1]. AI Deployment (1/2): Deploying AI for document automation and customer service but no breakthrough AI products shipping. Market Share (2/2): Category leader in online legal services for small businesses, dominant brand recognition [1]. Pipeline (0/2): Limited pipeline visibility. R&D Intensity (1/1): Above-average tech investment [1].

inspiration.label: DEVELOPING
inspiration.analysis: Mission Floor (2/4): Clear mission to make legal and business services accessible. Community Impact (1/2): Enables small business formation. Employee Retention (0/2): 1,196 employees, no data. Insider Buying (1/2): Some insider activity [1].

infrastructure.label: WEAK
infrastructure.analysis: LZ shows weak financials despite revenue growth. Forward P/E of 7.44 is attractive, but profit margin of 2.0% is very low, ROE of 11.6% below target [1]. D/E of 8.4% is conservative. Revenue growth of 17.7% is solid but earnings growth is negative at -57.9%. Liquidity cleared at $21.2M daily [1].

ai_resilience.label: HIGH RISK
ai_resilience.analysis: AI Risk Protection (4/9): LegalZoom faces significant AI disruption risk — AI legal tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Google Gemini) can increasingly handle document drafting, business formation, and compliance tasks that are LZ's core revenue [1]. The brand and user base provide some protection but the moat is narrowing. AI Opportunity (0/1): No AI revenue generation [1].

infinite_game.summary: LegalZoom has a genuine mission to democratize legal services but faces existential AI disruption threats.

just_cause.analysis: Shallow cause (1 pt → 4/10): Making legal services accessible is genuine but not deeply distinctive [1].

existential_flexibility.analysis: Some (1 pt → 6/10): Expanded from formation to compliance/subscriptions [1].

investment_thesis: LegalZoom is the category leader in online legal services with 17.7% revenue growth and a conservative balance sheet [1].
thesis_continued: AI disruption is the critical risk — AI legal tools are increasingly capable of handling LZ's core document and formation services, threatening the business model [1].
key_catalysts: Subscription revenue growth from compliance services [1]
Forward P/E of 7.44 suggests deep value if growth sustains [1]
key_risks: AI disruption from ChatGPT, Claude, and other AI legal tools [1]
Thin profit margins of 2.0% leave no margin for error [1]
sources: Yahoo Finance / yfinance data for LZ (LegalZoom), retrieved April 2026
